creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
===>  Extracting for unixbench-5.1.3.51_2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for kdlucas-byte-unixbench-v5.1.3-51-g6705203_GH0.tar.gz.
===>  Missing license file for GPLv2 in /usr/ports/benchmarks/unixbench/work/byte-unixbench-5.1.3-51-g6705203/UnixBench/LICENSE.txt

$ find /usr/ports/benchmarks/unixbench/ -name LICENSE.txt
/usr/ports/benchmarks/unixbench/work/byte-unixbench-5.1.3-51-g6705203/LICENSE.txt

It seems that LICENSE.txt is not in the directory where it's expected to be found but in the parent one.
